summary: 0.6.29 is a narrow follow-up to 0.6.28 that keeps the current CUA focus and trigger-tap behavior but broadens the temporary grab-navigation override to match the operator's joystick top or 5 input path.
operatorSignals: 0.6.28 was almost perfect, but the joystick top or 5 grab-navigation press still did not re-enable navigation.
The requested action is still strictly the temporary navigation override seam, not a broader panel or playback change.
actionsTaken: Kept the slice strictly inside the CUA input and focus seam.
Left the existing thumbstick-click override in place.
Added a Unity joystick button 5 fallback so the official button-number path can also release capture while held.
nonGoals: No A-B or transport policy changes.
